name: WritersProof for Clio
tagline: Prove your legal documents were drafted by a human attorney
description: WritersProof for Clio adds cryptographic authorship attestation to legal document drafting within Clio Manage and Clio Draft. As attorneys compose briefs, contracts, memoranda, and client correspondence, WritersProof captures tamper-evident proof of the drafting process without storing document content — only SHA-256 hashes. Law firms facing increasing scrutiny over AI-generated legal filings can demonstrate verifiable human authorship to courts, clients, and bar associations. Each attested document carries a cryptographic evidence chain that proves the attributed author genuinely composed the content.
features: Evidence capture during document drafting in Clio Draft and document management
Per-document attestation linked to the drafting attorney's identity
Matter-level attestation dashboard showing coverage across all documents
Court-ready attestation certificates exportable as PDF with verification links
Client-facing attestation reports demonstrating human-authored work product
Ethical wall compliance with per-matter evidence isolation
Integration with Clio's activity timeline for billing-correlated attestation

requirements.browser: Chrome, Firefox, Edge, or Safari with WritersProof browser extension
